name: xberg
description: Curated document-intelligence plugins by Kreuzberg, Inc.

plugins.name: xberg
plugins.description: Local document extraction: text, tables, metadata, images from 91+ formats with optional OCR.

plugins.name: crawlberg
plugins.description: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

plugins.name: html-to-markdown
plugins.description: Fast, lossless HTML→Markdown conversion with structured metadata, tables, and document-structure extraction.

plugins.name: liter-llm
plugins.description: Universal LLM API client for 143 providers — chat, streaming, tools, embeddings, search, OCR, plus an OpenAI-compatible proxy and an MCP server.

plugins.name: tree-sitter-language-pack
plugins.description: Parse and extract code intelligence from 300+ programming languages with tree-sitter — structure, imports, symbols, and syntax-aware chunking.
